description: Setup hooks for dotfiles-quality-gate plugin: guides recommended plugin installation

hooks.command:
bash -c 'cat <<EOF
📦 dotfiles-quality-gate plugin loaded

Recommended plugins (install with: claude plugin install <name>):
  • superpowers — TDD, debugging, code review
  • plugin-dev — Plugin development tools
  • mcp-server-dev — MCP server development
  • desktop-commander — File operations

Skills ready to use:
  /quality-pipeline, /setup-claude-code, /dotfiles-apply
EOF'
